PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/health" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Backend is running" } catch { Write-Host "Backend is NOT running: $_" })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N="CommandLine";E={$_.CommandLine}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(netstat -ano | Select-String ":3000" | ForEach-Object { $parts = $_ -split '\\s+'; $pid = $parts[-1]; $proc = Get-Process -Id $pid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Host "PID $pid - $\($proc.ProcessName\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/notifications" -Headers @{Authorization = "Bearer test"} -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)`nBody: $\($response.Content\)" } catch { $statusCode = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); Write-Host "Status: $statusCode`nBody: $body" })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 39696 | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, @{N="CommandLine";E={\(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}})
PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 39696 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { $stderr = $_.StandardError; if \($stderr\) { $stderr.ReadToEnd\(\) } } catch { } })

PowerShell(try { $body = @{identifier = "test"; password = "test123"} | ConvertTo-Json; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)`nBody: $\($response.Content\)" } catch { $statusCode = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); Write-Host "Status: $statusCode`nBody: $body" })

PowerShell(try { $body = @{username = "testnotif"; email = "testnotif@test.com"; password = "Test1234!"} | ConvertTo-Json; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)`nBody: $\($response.Content\)" } catch { $statusCode = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); Write-Host "Status: $statusCode`nBody: $body" })
